evals.prompt: Audit driftroast.com against its topical map and tell me what's missing and what's competing.
evals.expected_output: An audit report with coverage gaps, cannibalization, entity drift, orphans, micro-issues, each provenance-tagged, plus a prioritised action list; map statuses updated.

assertions.text: report includes all five finding types
assertions.name: all_finding_types

assertions.text: at least one finding is hand-verifiable (true gap or true cannibalization)
assertions.name: verifiable

assertions.text: no fabricated scores (drift/cannibalization derived or asserted)
assertions.name: no_fake_scores
